problem_statement: Nested Mind exposes a GitHub action execution boundary that connects GitHub App token evidence to REST action execution evidence for check-run writes and branch-protection reconciliation. Mullu Control Plane has GitHub App token-exchange and check-run write receipt boundaries, but no local receipt planner that binds token plan repository identity, action payload hash, approval evidence, external execution evidence, 2xx response status, and response hash before an execute-approved GitHub action claim is admitted.
success_criteria: GitHub action execution plans build deterministic REST endpoint, method, payload, and payload-hash evidence for check-run write and branch-protection reconcile actions
Token plan repository owner and name must match the action repository owner and name before any action execution claim is admitted
Plan-only and dry-run modes perform no GitHub network call, authenticate no request, store no raw token, and cannot claim live action response evidence

Execute-approved mode requires operator approval, GitHub App token-exchange receipt ref, external execution receipt ref, 2xx response status, and response payload hash before an external action execution claim is admitted
Raw token, JWT, or private-key shaped material in metadata, action payload, or refs blocks receipt admission with explicit causal reasons
The GitHub action execution receipt is schema-backed, indexed in the governance protocol manifest, and included in proof coverage matrix witnesses
No live GitHub API call, workflow dispatch, branch protection mutation, check-run mutation, deployment, or production readiness claim is introduced
constraints: all execute-approved claims must bind external execution evidence instead of performing the GitHub action in the planner
plan-only and dry-run modes must remain free of external effects and response evidence
token plan repository identity must match action repository identity
response payload hashes must be sha256-prefixed hex digests
response status must be 2xx before execute-approved admission
raw token, JWT, or private-key shaped material must fail closed
receipt generation must be deterministic and schema-valid
evidence_required: focused GitHub action execution test receipt
standalone SDLC requirement and design validation receipt
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
